sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n90969" key="prwto/zugon" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πρωτό-ζῠγον</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <sense id="n90969.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">front rank</tr_> of a squad of cavalry, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg2956.tlg002:p.58" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Afric.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Cest.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">p.58</biblScope> </bibl> V.</sense> </entryFree>
